summary: Fix saved-mode type candidate scoring for saved-star granted skills and role-limited bullet clauses.
rootCause: Saved-mode type-candidate filtering only treated resolved source skill names as owned and checked unowned skill names against the full matchedText before role filtering. Skills granted by saved-star-unlocked skills were therefore treated as unowned, and role headers such as ■主将の際 did not scope following ●/▼ bullet clauses, allowing limited clauses to be wrongly kept or removed for other roles.
externalizationDecision: No HTML/CSS change. The fix is in external JavaScript scoring/candidate logic and validation tooling.
minimumUserAcceptance: In saved-data mode, open type candidates for a type affected by a saved-star-unlocked granted skill and role-limited clauses. Confirm the owned granted skill scores only in the eligible role tab and the ineligible role tab does not receive that limited score.
